prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年最低位次约2228→1869→1628，呈持续前移趋势，近3年累计前移约600名；2025年基准约1628名，为近年最高水平；本省理科计划20 23年66人、2024年66人、2025年60人；2026年计划仅24人，较2025年大幅缩招60%，名额显著减少，竞争压力明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 主榜2026年第37名（2025年第36名、2024年第36名），排名稳定在前40，属全国顶尖理工类院校；2025年声誉偏正面：投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工程师学 院、保研率逐年提升至27%；2026年有实验室安全事件但影响有限；抖音热度排名第61（一般），整体报考关注度平稳偏升；第五轮学科评估A-及以上7个：力学 A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，工科实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（2025年理科约5.3万人），按历史比例估算2026年理科考生约16.3 万人，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧；南京航空航天大学位于江苏南京，属东部发达地区，对新疆考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1628名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招60%（名额从60人减至24人）以及本省理科考生规模显著扩大， 竞争压力明显加剧，预计最低录取位次将前移至约1012名；预测区间860–1164名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类
- 自动化
- 电子信息类
- 交通运输（交通运输+大数据管理与应用双学士学位）
- 信息与计算科学（信息与计算科学+人工智能双学士学位）
- 应用统计学
- 飞行器适航技术
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 测控技术与仪器
- 应用物理学（应用物理学+电子信息科学与技术双学士学位）
- 软件工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 智能制造工程
- 机器人工程
- 交通运输
- 核工程类（核工程与核技术、辐射防护与核安全）
- 信息与计算科学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1012名，区间860–1164名。建议位次在区间内的考生以二档专业为主力选择（软件工程A-、测控技术与仪器、应用物理学双学位），一档专业（航空航天类、自动化 、电子信息类）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（智能制造工程、机器人工程等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（860名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 2228 → 1869 → 1628, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 600 positions in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1628, the highest level in recent years; the provincial science enrollment plan was 66 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 60 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 24, a significant reduction of 60% compared to 2025, with a notable decrease in slots, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking (36th in 2025, 36th in 2024), stable in the top 40, belonging to the top national science and engineering institutions; positive reputation in 2025: steadily increasing admission scores, selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, graduate school recommendation rate gradually rising to 27%; a laboratory safety incident in 2026 had limited impact; Douyin popularity ranking 61st (average), overall application attention stable with a slight upward trend; 7 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 238,000 (about 53,000 science candidates in 2025), estimated at about 163,000 science candidates in 2026 based on historical proportions, with a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an eastern developed region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Xinjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1628, the significant reduction of 60% in the 2026 enrollment plan (slots reduced from 60 to 24), and the notable expansion of the provincial science candidate scale, competition is clearly intensified, and the minimum admission ranking is expected to move forward to approximately 1012; prediction range 860–1164.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Aerospace Engineering
- Automation
- Electronic Information
- Transportation (Transportation + Big Data Management and Application Dual Degree)
- Information and Computing Science (Information and Computing Science + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree)
- Applied Statistics
- Aircraft Airworthiness Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments
- Applied Physics (Applied Physics + Electronic Information Science and Technology Dual Degree)
- Software Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Robotics Engineering
- Transportation
- Nuclear Engineering (Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, Radiation Protection and Nuclear Safety)
- Information and Computing Science
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1012, range 860–1164. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as primary choices (Software Engineering A-, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Applied Physics Dual Degree), Tier 1 majors (Aerospace Engineering, Automation, Electronic Information) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Robotics Engineering, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 860) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
